name: Neko Ghost, Jump! Prologue
short_description: Neko Ghost, Jump! Prologue is the first complete biome of a 2D/3D puzzle-platformer where you not only switch between your camera perspectives at any time but also between your physical and ghost forms to solve puzzles, combat enemies, and clear levels faster.
detailed_description:
Wishlist The Full Game


About the Game

Neko Ghost, Jump! Prologue is the first complete biome of a 2D/3D Puzzle-Platformer where you switch between 2D & 3D camera perspectives and between your physical form & ghost form to solve puzzles, collect coins, combat enemies and clear levels faster.

Five handcrafted levels that will sometimes leave you scratching your head to progress until the finale with the Grassylands Boss. Can you defeat it?

  • Competitive? There are leaderboards in every level so you can compete against others.
  • Want to take your sweet time? Don't worry about the clock. Explore, solve puzzles, find secrets all the while collecting as many coins as possible and unlocking new customization options!
  • Action junky? Defeat enemies for extra loot!

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
